channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on cabinet, 23rd March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Camberwell Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 61 Hartland, 23rd March
item.description:
Dumped clothes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Honiton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Brown caddy left on bollard of corner of Harding Road, 23rd March
item.description:
Brown caddy put on bollard on corner of Harding Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathside Avenue, Greater London

item.title: Rubhish dumped on pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken wine bottle all over pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Broken jagged glass all over pavement near 11 Wellington Avenue and 51 bus stop. Extremely hazardous and dangerous to members of the public and animals.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A, Wellington Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders' rubble and other rubbish in phone box on Whitworth Street, 23rd March
item.description:
Builders' rubble and other rubbish in phone box on Whitworth Street. The phone box is also missing glass panes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitworth Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree hasn't been looked after, 23rd March
item.description:
I made a previous report 9121483 and it has been closed without being resolved and without any contact with me. I am not making an insurance claim on the tree causing damage, I have had my house inspected by a structural engineer and I was advised to contact Bromley council to get the tree trimmed back as he said it is getting too big and will cause problems if not resolved. It hasn't been maintained for a few years and must now be overdue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on both sides of the bridge, 23rd March
item.description:
Furniture, mattresses and household rubbish bags seem to be piling up on both sides of Eversley Cross in the past few days, obstructing the pavement. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eversley Cross, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish on Mehetabel Rd, 23rd March
item.description:
Large cardboard boxes left in road. One has address label for Jordan Morillo, Tapstudio, 107-117 Morning Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mehetabel Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 14 Teignmouth Road, 23rd March
item.description:
Evening, there is an old suitcase left at the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Teignmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated fly tipping., 23rd March
item.description:
Not 24hrs after last tip was cleared, now there’s another fly tip which inevitably will only get bigger. What sort of humans live nearby ?!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Talbot Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on roundabout, 23rd March
item.description:
Pothole is on roundabout by exit onto Cambridge road no way to avoid and getting dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The street has not been cleaned for weeks, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish is all over the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Erebus Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This car is still here..., 23rd March
item.description:
...I think it might be stolen and dumped. It hasn't moved for ages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durham Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeater lights rotated and not visible, 23rd March
item.description:
Southbound at bottom of regent street as it gives on to piccadilly circus : repeater lights rotated and not visible
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Piccadilly Circus, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Several deep potholes, 23rd March
item.description:
These potholes have been here for weeks are not marked with white and are deep and dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Covent Garden, City of Westminster

item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction
